name: institution-management-starter-kit
description: Microservices starter kit for institution management systems

scripts.build:all: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w services/api-gateway && npm run build -w services/auth-service && npm run build -w services/user-service && npm run build -w services/role-service && npm run build -w services/department-service && npm run build -w services/resource-service && npm run build -w services/transaction-service && npm run build -w services/notification-service && npm run build -w services/report-service && npm run build -w services/dashboard-service
